title: Tiers SMP
description: This Plugin Adds Ranks to your server. An Operator can set other peoples ranks, better rank equals better rewards.
body:
A comprehensive Minecraft SMP plugin with tier-based progression, PvP mechanics, and competitive gameplay.
  
  ## ✨ Features
  
  ### 🔢 Tier System (HT1-HT5, LT1-LT5)
  - 10-tier progression + UNRANKED
  - Tier swap PvP: lower tier kills higher tier = swap ranks
  - Dynamic nameplate prefixes
  - Tier-based max health (10-20 hearts)
  - Tier-specific potion effects
  
  ### ⚔️ PvP Mechanics
  - Tier-based combat with rank progression
  - Killstreak rewards (every 5 kills)
  - Team-based PvP protection
  - Natural death penalties (demotion after 4 deaths)
  - Grace period & protection systems
  
  ### 💾 Persistence
  - UUID-based player tracking
  - Automatic data saving
  - Killstreak & stat tracking
  
  ### 🎮 Commands
  - `/tier info` - Check tier
  - `/tier set <player> <HT|LT> <1-5>` (OP)
  - `/tier remove <player>` (OP)
  - `/tier bounty` - Bounty system
  - `/tier grace <minutes>` (OP)
  - `/tier tierprotection <minutes>` (OP)
  - Check out the plugin for more commands!
  
  ### 🎁 Bounty System
  - Item-based bounties
  - Claim rewards on kill
  - Active bounty listings
  
  ### 🛡️ Protection
  - Grace period for new/joining players
  - Configurable tier protection
  - Spawn protection
  - Elytra cooldown timer
  
  ### 🏃 Rune Abilities
  - Dash, Feather, Impact runes
  - Cooldown-based abilities
  - Rituals for God, Heal, Speed, Dragon runes
  
  ### 🔧 Custom Items
  - SMP Mace
  - Custom crafting recipes

license: Custom
